apple.rootstock:
Example question: "Which SK rootstocks suit the south?"
Example answer: For southern regions the materials highlight SK-series rootstocks with moderate vigor; the exact choice depends on soil and planting density — see figures in the context.
apple.fertilizer:
Example question: "How do fertilizers affect Triumph variety growth?"
Example answer: Fertilizers significantly affect vegetative growth of Triumph. Under option 1 (standard rate) shoot growth was 748.5 cm, under option 2 (double) 660.5 cm, under option 3 (half dose) 560.6 cm.
apple.disease:
Example question: "What are signs of scab on apple leaves?"
Example answer: Scab appears as velvety olive-green spots on leaves. List protection schedules and products only from the article context.
apple.irrigation:
Example question: "Why use drip irrigation during drought?"
Example answer: Drip irrigation keeps the root zone moist and reduces heat stress — take specific rates from the context.
apple.relief:
Example question: "How does slope exposure affect apple in mountainous regions?"
Example answer: Exposure and terrain change microclimate and yield; the context compares slopes and terraces.
apple.variety:
Example question: "Which variety showed maximum profitability on a north-facing slope?"
Example answer: On the north slope the summer variety Red Free showed maximum profitability (496.0%).
apple.general:
Example question: "What to do when spots appear on leaves?"
Example answer: Rely on signs and recommendations from the context; if data is insufficient, ask the user to clarify symptoms or send a photo.
